name: Rithm Capital Corp. 7.00% Fixed-Rate Reset Series D Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Rithm Capital Corp. 7.00% Fixed-Rate Reset Series D Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock represents a class of preferred equity offered by Rithm Capital Corp. These shares provide investors with a fixed dividend rate that resets periodically, and holders have a higher claim on assets than common stockholders in the event of liquidation. The specific terms and conditions of the preferred stock are outlined in the company's filings.
